reviewReply.comment: Glad you enjoyed the sandwich. We’d love to know how we can make your next visit even better.

reviews.comment: The service was veryyy veryyyy slow. The staff dont even acknowledge if a person is calling for some service. The water glass was smelling bad and the sandwich was cold and stale. The drinks were good but very delayed. The cutlery and glasses were uncleaned and flies flying on food. Horrible experience, never eating here again!!

reviewReply.comment:
We’re really sorry to hear about this experience. The delays, cleanliness concerns, and food quality you described are not the standards we aim to deliver, and we take this feedback very seriously. We’d truly like the chance to look into this and make it right.

Please DM us on Instagram @coffee.island.in or write to us at hello@coffeeisland.in, and our team will connect with you directly.
